ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of the stock exchange (e.g., stock, commodity, forex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company issuing the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company issuing the stock */,
  "stock_type" TEXT /* Type of the stock (e.g., common, preferred) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change of the stock on the given date */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percent change of the stock on the given date */,
  "market_cap" INTEGER /* Market capitalization of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price history record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the stock price history record */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the stock price history record */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price of the stock during the given period */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price of the stock during the given period */,
  "ma_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "ma_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative strength index of the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading volume record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "avg_daily_volume" INTEGER /* Average daily trading volume of the stock */,
  "avg_monthly_volume" INTEGER /* Average monthly trading volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Password reset token of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the platform was accessed */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the platform was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange symbol mapping */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "exchange_status" TEXT /* Status of the stock exchange (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_map_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_category_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock category mapping */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the stock (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the stock category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_category_map_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the market trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the market trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., upward, downward) */,
  "trend_confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the market trend analysis */,
  "trend_strength" REAL /* Strength of the market trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
